steps.title: Interpret the notation f(0)
steps.content: The notation $f(0)$ asks for the output value of the function when the input is $x = 0$. This is where the curve crosses the y-axis.

steps.title: Read the y-coordinate from the graph at x = 0
steps.content: Locate $x = 0$ on the graph (the y-axis). The curve intersects the y-axis at the point $(0, -6)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
